sanskrit: न च मां तानि कर्माणि निबध्नन्ति धनञ्जय। उदासीनवदासीनमसक्तं तेषु कर्मसु।।
transliteration: na ca māṃ tāni karmāṇi nibadhnanti dhanañjaya | udāsīnavad āsīnam asaktaṃ teṣu karmasu ||
literal_meaning: Never / also / Me / those / actions / bind / O Arjuna / like neutral / seated / unattached / in those / activities
contextual_meaning: Krishna reassures Arjuna that divine presence is never trapped by the very activities it animates; the Self remains a non-reactive witness while the personality engages.
psychological_state: Observer-mode activation: the capacity to perform demanding roles while the inner mood stays uncluttered by outcomes.
trigger_scenario: A nurse works 12-hour shifts in ICU chaos yet leaves the hospital without carrying the deaths or recoveries home—skills practiced, heart still light.
anchor_text: Stay calm inside while fully engaged outside.
